expo.name: Windy Word
expo.description: Your voice, unlimited. Record, transcribe, translate, and clone your voice — all from your phone.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Windy Pro uses your microphone to convert speech to text. Audio is processed on your device and never sent to our servers.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Windy Pro uses speech recognition to convert your voice to text.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Windy Pro uses your camera for OCR translation and optional video recording.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Windy Pro tags recordings with location for easy searching. Location data stays on your device.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Windy Pro saves exported recordings and translations to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Windy Pro saves exported recordings to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Windy Chat uses your contacts for contact discovery so you can find friends.

plugins.cameraPermission: Windy Pro uses your camera for OCR translation and optional video recording.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Windy Pro tags recordings with location for easy searching.

plugins.microphonePermission: Windy Pro needs microphone access to convert your speech to text.

plugins.contactsPermission: Windy Chat uses your contacts for contact discovery so you can find friends.
